description: Contains patent publication records representing published versions of patent applications, including publication dates and document details.

columns.name: publn_auth
columns.description: Two-letter code of the authority that published the patent document.

columns.name: publn_nr
columns.description: Publication number in a standardized format.

columns.name: publn_kind
columns.description: Kind code indicating the type of publication (e.g., A1=first publication, B1=granted patent).

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the underlying patent application.

columns.name: publn_date
columns.description: Date when the patent document was officially published.

columns.name: publn_first_grant
columns.description: Flag indicating if this publication represents the first grant of the patent.

columns.name: publn_claims
columns.description: Number of claims in the published patent document.

columns.name: pat_publn_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each patent publication document.

columns.name: publn_nr_original
columns.description: Original publication number as assigned by the publishing authority.

columns.name: publn_lg
columns.description: Two-letter language code of the publication.
